name: AWS IAM Successful User Console Login With SAML Provider
description: Detects a successful console login via a SAML identity provider, which may be a legitimate user action but is important to monitor, as in worst-case scenarios it could indicate an attacker exploiting misconfigured federation or stolen credentials to gain unauthorized access to AWS resources.

filterSets.name: AWS IAM Successful User Console Login With SAML Provider

author: Yash Verma & Christopher Ordonez
